# Core.ColorKeywords.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `Core.ColorKeywords.txt` | 字数: 700

## 内容全文

Core.ColorKeywords

TYPE: hash

VERSION: 2.0.0

--DEFAULT--

array (

'maroon' => '#800000',

'red' => '#FF0000',

'orange' => '#FFA500',

'yellow' => '#FFFF00',

'olive' => '#808000',

'purple' => '#800080',

'fuchsia' => '#FF00FF',

'white' => '#FFFFFF',

'lime' => '#00FF00',

'green' => '#008000',

'navy' => '#000080',

'blue' => '#0000FF',

'aqua' => '#00FFFF',

'teal' => '#008080',

'black' => '#000000',

'silver' => '#C0C0C0',

'gray' => '#808080',

)

--DESCRIPTION--

Lookup array of color names to six digit hexadecimal number corresponding

to color, with preceding hash mark. Used when parsing colors.  The lookup

is done in a case-insensitive manner.

--# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
